zh.lifeSummary: 當Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias於1232年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞瓦爾德拉班諾時，他的父親Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda62歲，母親Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva49歲。他於1261年與Aldonza Ramirez在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1266年享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias于1232年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞瓦爾德拉班諾时，他的父亲Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda62岁，母亲Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva49岁。他于1261年与Aldonza Ramirez在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1266年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Asturias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from the Asturias region in northern Spain, named by the Romans for its contemporary inhabitants, the Astures.

nameMeanings.name: Arias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Rare, and of uncertain origin, possibly from the surname Amias, which is a local name for someone from Amiens in France. However, both surname and given name are rare. The ending -ias is found in biblical names (e.g. Tobias ), where it represents a Greek form of Hebrew -iyah ‘God’ Amias may sometimes have been chosen in the belief that it was a biblical name, reinforced by the fact that am- is the Latin root meaning ‘love’. See also Amiaz and Amyas .

nameMeanings.name: Diaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim name, from Persian: ‘prayer; gift or offering’.

en.lifeSummary: When Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias was born in 1232, in Valderrábano, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda, was 62 and his mother, Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva, was 49. He married Aldonza Ramirez in 1261, in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1266, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias est né en 1232, à Valderrábano, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Aldonza Ramirez en 1261, à Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1266, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias 1232 in Valderrábano, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda 62 und seine Mutter Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva 49. Er hat 1261 in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien Aldonza Ramirez geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1266 im Alter von 34 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias è nato il nel 1232 nel Valderrábano, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva, aveva 49 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias(이)가 1232년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 파렌샤 발더a바노에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1261년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라 세비라에서 Aldonza Ramirez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1266년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arias Diaz de Valderabano de Asturias родился в 1232 г. в местности валдиррaбано, пеиленся, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Aldonza Ramirez в 1261 г. в местности севилла, севилла, андалукiа, Испания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1266 г. в возрасте 34 лет.
